pr.title: Non-record: Random Linear Maps + Learned Adapters (val_bpb=1.93, 2.4MB artifact)

output.summary: Seeded random linear projections supply base weights while tiny learned rank-16 adapters are the only stored params, letting a sub-2.5MB model learn language with tuned depth/rank.
techniques: Seeded random weights regenerated on init so base matrices cost zero artifact space
LoRA-style rank-16 adapter A/B factors store the only learned updates
Depth and rank sweeps identify sweet spots under a fixed wallclock budget
